news.headline: Eastern Union obtains $10.965M loan to refinance 71,000 sq ft property in Newark, NJ.
news.summary: In New York on February 14, 2025, Eastern Union, a leading commercial real estate mortgage brokerage in the United States, successfully facilitated a $10.965 million loan for the refinancing of a 71,000-square-foot mixed-use property located in the Central Ward of Newark, New Jersey. This mortgage was obtained to support the ongoing construction of the property.

news.headline: Demand for Personal AI and Robotics Market is growing, driven by cultural shift towards embracing robotic assistance. Service robotics market expanding with the report projecting the industry to reach $93.1 billion by 2030.
news.summary: A report titled "Personal Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Market by Application, Robot Type, Connectivity, Components, and Price for 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The service robotics market is experiencing rapid growth, separate from the traditional industrial robotics market. Service robots include physical machines and software-based bots aimed at aiding individuals and businesses. These robots are transitioning from specialized devices to more versatile solutions.

news.headline: ARRIVE by Palisociety opens new location in downtown Albuquerque, New Mexico on Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: A new ARRIVE by Palisociety boutique hotel has recently opened its doors in downtown Albuquerque, New Mexico. This expansion marks the brand's latest addition to its national portfolio. The new ARRIVE Albuquerque is located in the heart of the city and offers guests a unique experience. This development was announced on February 14, 2025, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Audriix releases new single "Where the Boys Are" on Feb 14. Co-written by Kevin Rudolf, marks her return to the Top 40 chart.
news.summary: Renowned musician Kevin Rudolf has collaborated on a captivating new song with rising star Audriix, set to debut on February 14, 2025. Titled "Where the Boys Are," the track blends themes of temptation and empowerment. Audriix, known for her presence on Top 40 charts, is creating buzz around the release of this eagerly awaited single before Valentine's Day.

news.headline: Coeur Mining completes acquisition of SilverCrest Metals with all issued shares acquired.
news.summary: In Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) has successfully finalized its acquisition of SilverCrest Metals Inc. The acquisition, which was completed per the definitive agreement announced on October 4, 2024, involved Coeur acquiring all of SilverCrest's common shares. Shareholders of SilverCrest received a substantial sum as part of the transaction.

news.headline: Heritage Capital Group assists SprayEZ in sale; Spray Equipment and Coatings, Inc. acquired	.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 14, 2025, Heritage Capital Group, Inc., a financial advisory firm catering to middle-market and emerging growth businesses globally, has shared news about its client Spray Equipment and Coatings, Inc.'s latest developments.

news.headline: Pro-grade audiovisual inventory from Solotech's Southern California depot goes to auction on Feb 25 by Tiger Group.
news.summary: An upcoming online auction hosted by Tiger Group on February 25, 2025, will showcase a variety of used and new audiovisual products and other excess assets from Solotech's Southern California depot. The sale, taking place in Westminster, California, will offer a range of AV gear from Solotech. The auction presents a significant opportunity for buyers to acquire high-quality equipment at competitive prices.

news.headline: Online Labels Group acquires LabelValue, a Tampa-based label provider, expanding its reach in the industry. Acquisition announced on Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Sanford, Florida, on February 14, 2025, Online Labels Group has officially acquired LabelValue, a reputable label supplier located in Tampa, Florida. This acquisition marks a significant move for Online Labels Group, solidifying its position in the industry. The acquisition brings together two prominent companies in the label market, further enhancing Online Labels Group's offerings and market presence.

news.headline: EC Pres. von der Leyen: The EU must be at the negotiating table on Ukraine.
DeFi sees a shift from staking to airdrop tokens as passive income method; potentially lucrative in 2025.
news.summary: The DeFi sector is rapidly growing, with a new method of earning passive income called airdrop collection tokens gaining popularity. These tokens automate the process of receiving token rewards from airdrops across various blockchain networks, offering a more flexible and efficient alternative to traditional staking and liquidity mining. Unlike staking, airdrop tokens do not require users to lock up their assets, providing full control over their tokens while still earning passive income. This shift in strategy could make airdrop collection tokens one of the most profitable investment opportunities by 2025. This development signals a significant change in the DeFi landscape, opening up new avenues for earning rewards without the limitations of traditional methods.

news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate increased by 1,842%, aiming to reduce supply and drive price appreciation - SHIB priced at $0.00001646, $9.7 billion market cap. Dogecoin priced at $0.2678 with a $39.7 billion market cap and a +4.4% trend in 24-hours. Pepe priced at $0.00001013, $4.3 billion market cap with a +4.4% trend in 24-hours. 'Dogecoin millionaire' Glauber Contessoto warns of oversaturation in crypto market due to new meme coin launches.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is intensifying its token burn approach to decrease supply and boost value. SHIB is currently priced at $0.00001646 with a market cap of $9.7 billion, showing a 1.5% increase in the last 24 hours and a 7.7% uptrend over the week. Similarly, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) stands at $0.2678 with a market cap of $39.7 billion, experiencing a 4.4% 24-hour rise and a 5% increase in the past 7 days. Another crypto, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), is priced at $0.00001013 with a market cap of $4.3 billion, showing a 4.4% daily hike and a 6.5% weekly surge. Glauber Contessoto, known as the 'Dogecoin millionaire,' cautions about oversaturation in the meme coin market, stating that navigating through it has become chaotic due to numerous new launches. Contessoto suggests that the earlier strategy of holding DOGE and SHIB was more straightforward. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Study shows advancements in high-performance photon detectors using superconducting nanowires; overcoming design challenges.
news.summary: A new fabrication method has been created by researchers in Piscataway, New Jersey, as of February 14, 2025, not specified by PRNewswire. This technique is designed to address issues surrounding the design and functionality of scalable single-photon detectors. The detectors in focus, known as superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs), employ extremely thin superconducting wires. Through this innovation, these detectors can now achieve improved performance in detecting single photons effectively. This advancement marks a significant milestone in the field of photonics, promising enhanced scalability and efficiency for SNSPDs.

news.headline: Bob Woodruff Foundation & Veterans Bridge Home to host summit in Charlotte to support veterans on Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: Leaders from across the nation and region will convene to explore ways to enhance support systems along the I-85 Corridor in Charlotte, North Carolina. The Bob Woodruff Foundation, in collaboration with Veterans Bridge Home, and with substantial backing from Craig Newmark, will spearhead this initiative. The gathering aims to address key issues and devise strategies to bolster assistance networks for veterans and their families. The event, set for Feb. 14, 2025, is poised to bring together a significant number of stakeholders to drive impactful change in the region.

news.headline: IT-Harvest chosen for 2025 Google for Startups Growth Academy: AI for Cybersecurity, recognizing 16 innovative startups globally.
news.summary: A company based in Birmingham, Michigan, known as IT-Harvest, has been chosen to participate in the 2025 Google for Startups Growth Academy focused on AI for Cybersecurity. This exclusive program features 16 cutting-edge startups from across the globe that are using artificial intelligence for improving cybersecurity measures. The selection showcases IT-Harvest's dedication to utilizing advanced technology in the cybersecurity sector.

news.headline: Perfect Moment Ltd. introduces new puffer tote bags & sunglasses collection, combining style & practicality for on-the-go.
news.summary: A luxury skiwear brand, Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT), known for its high-performance designs, has recently introduced its latest products. This includes the new puffer tote bag and sunglass collection. The idea for the puffer bags stemmed from the packing method of Perfect Moment’s president and chief creative officer, Jane Gottschalk. These jumbo padded totes are designed with a practical 'throw in & go' approach, making them versatile companions for daily life. The brand continues to blend technical excellence with trendy designs, catering to its high-end clientele.

news.headline: Tennessee Retirement Specialist Phil Dortch provides free seminars to help retirees cut taxes now as confidence drops 33%.
news.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, as of February 14, 2025, essential tax reduction and estate tax elimination strategies are being provided to retirees. The confidence levels of retirees about their retirement have significantly dropped by 33% in 2023, and the confidence has not yet rebounded to previous levels.

news.headline: Singapore's loyalty market expected to grow by 14.4% annually, reaching US$501.5 million in 2025 dominated by NTUC FairPrice, DBS Bank, Grab, Shopee, and Lazada.
news.summary: A recent report on the Singapore Loyalty Programs market indicates significant growth potential. The market is projected to expand by 14.4% annually, with an estimated value of US$501.5 million by 2025. Over the past years, the sector has already seen a compound annual growth rate of 16.2%. The report provides detailed insights on loyalty program trends across various end-use sectors, operational metrics, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. This data-driven analysis offers over 50 key performance indicators to help understand the market landscape and anticipate future growth dynamics.

news.headline: BOOM! Beauty upgrades formula + introduces sustainable packaging, celebrating aging skin. Revamped collection offers enhanced hydration + nourishment.
news.summary: Launching on February 14, 2025 in Los Angeles, BOOM! Beauty introduces a new collection of skincare products aimed at nourishing and hydrating aging skin. The revamped Boomstick line offers clean, sustainable, and cruelty-free formulas, celebrating eco-friendly luxury. This pro-age beauty brand focuses on delivering enhanced hydration, emphasizing the importance of natural ingredients. With a commitment to aging skin care, BOOM! Beauty is revolutionizing the beauty industry by promoting products that are both effective and environmentally conscious.

news.headline: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: ZONE) reports 6.5% revenue growth for 2nd quarter FY2025, focusing on market adoption and cost-efficiency.
news.summary: CleanCore Solutions reported its second quarter 2025 financial results, highlighting a rapid adoption of its patented technology by building service contractors for cost savings and sustainability benefits. The company has commenced worldwide rollout with a leading enterprise software company and expanded international partnerships with Fortune 500 clients. Product reengineering initiatives are underway to lower cost of goods sold. CEO Clayton Adams mentioned recent contracts in education and aviation sectors, emphasizing the shift to a direct sales recurring revenue model. Revenue for the six months ended December 31, 2024, grew by 6.5%, despite temporary revenue dip and expense increase due to a new sales approach. Major organizations like an international hotel chain and US-based fitness centers are piloting their solutions.

news.headline: Dexcom's Q4 revenue up 8% to $1.114 billion, beats estimates. Adjusted gross profit declines, operating income down.
news.summary: Dexcom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) saw a rise in premarket trading following the release of its fourth-quarter results. Revenue for the quarter reached $1.114 billion, marking an 8% increase from the previous year and surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.104 billion. U.S. revenue grew by 4%, while international revenue showed a significant rise of 17% on a reported basis and 19% organically. Adjusted gross profit decreased to $661.2 million from $663.8 million, leading to a margin shrink from 64.2% to 59.4%. Adjusted operating income also saw a decline to $209.5 million from $242.7 million, with the margin contracting by 470 basis points.

news.headline: AMC Networks Q4 revenue down 11.7% to $599.31M, adjusted EPS down 11.1% to 64 cents. Affiliate revenue fell 13% due to subscriber declines.
news.summary: AMC Networks Inc (NASDAQ: AMCX) posted a revenue decline of 11.7% in the fiscal fourth quarter of 2024, amounting to $599.31 million, which missed the analyst consensus of $609.44 million. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 64 cents, down 11.1% from the previous year and also falling short of the analyst estimate of 72 cents. In terms of domestic operations, affiliate revenue saw a 13% decrease primarily due to basic subscriber declines. Additionally, advertising revenues dropped by 12% to $139 million year-over-year, attributed to expected linear ratings declines and a challenging market environment.

news.headline: Veracyte presents data at ASCO GU showcasing effectiveness of Decipher tests in improving patient care. #ProstateCancer #BladderCancer #Research
news.summary: South San Francisco, California – Veracyte recently presented new data at the ASCO GU conference, revealing the impactful results of their Decipher tests in enhancing patient care. Additionally, their GRID tool was showcased for its role in advancing research related to prostate and bladder cancer. These advancements were highlighted for their potential to significantly transform the landscape of cancer treatment.

news.headline: Mediaplanet & NBA star Jason Preston promote lung health awareness through campaign in USA TODAY; focus on risks, prevention, early detection.
news.summary: The Lung Health campaign by Mediaplanet is featured in USA TODAY and online, aiming to increase awareness and educate the public on the significance of lung health. It sheds light on the risks, prevention strategies, and early detection methods for lung-related diseases. The campaign, launched on February 14, 2025, emphasizes the importance of maintaining healthy lungs.

news.headline: European Commission greenlights CSL and Arcturus' KOSTAIVE®, a self-amplifying mRNA COVID-19 vaccine with lasting immunity.
news.summary: A groundbreaking vaccine, KOSTAIVE, has showcased a major development in vaccine technology, showing increased effectiveness in immunity and longer-lasting antibody presence for a period of 12 months after administration. This is in comparison to traditional mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as evidenced in clinical trials conducted in Waltham, Mass., and San Diego. The results indicate significant progress and promise in the fight against the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: iRobot to hold Q4 & full-year 2024 earnings call on March 12. $IRBT, leader in consumer robots, to release press prior.
news.summary: iRobot Corp., a prominent player in consumer robots, revealed its plan to conduct the fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 earnings conference call on March 12. The event is scheduled to take place in Bedford, Mass., and will provide insights into the company's performance. iRobot, listed on NASDAQ as IRBT, will precede the call with a press release detailing key financial information. This forthcoming announcement is anticipated to shed light on crucial figures and projections for stakeholders and analysts.

news.headline: happy® Products, co-founded by Craig Dubitsky and Robert Downey Jr., expands to Albertsons, increasing distribution to 60,000 locations, including big-box retailers and e-commerce platforms.
news.summary: The expanding success of the brand happy® has led to its availability in over 60,000 locations across prominent big-box stores, local grocery outlets, and online marketplaces. The company, established by entrepreneur Craig, has experienced rapid and targeted development in various retail channels. The announcement was made in New York on February 14, 2025.

news.headline: Enbridge files its Form 10-K for 2024 with the SEC, including audited Financial Statements.
news.summary: Enbridge Inc. (TSX: ENB) (NYSE: ENB) headquartered in Calgary, AB, submitted its Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing includes the audited Consolidated Financial Statements as well as other pertinent documents.

news.headline: iHealth CEO, Jack Feng, named one of Silicon Valley Business Journal's 2025 Power 100 Leaders, shaping industries & communities.
news.summary: CEO Jack Feng of iHealth Labs, Inc. (iHealth®) in Sunnyvale, California, has been included in the annual list recognizing influential leaders in various industries and communities. The announcement was made on February 14, 2025. iHealth Labs is a prominent provider of digital health solutions. This recognition highlights the impact and influence of CEO Jack Feng within the company and beyond.

news.headline: Hanee Aprons launches Everyday Pinafore Collection in March 2024 in Vancouver, emphasizing sustainability and practical comfort.
news.summary: A company based in Vancouver, BC, Hanee Aprons is redefining daily wear by focusing on thoughtful design and eco-friendly materials. They have recently unveiled their latest Everyday Pinafore Apron collection in March 2024. This collection merges classic design elements with modern comfort, emphasizing sustainability. The company is committed to creating pieces that are both stylish and practical, leading the way in the fashion industry with their innovative approach.

news.headline: Parade spotlights Sterling K. Brown, discussing "Paradise" on Hulu, fatherhood, and race in entertainment. Full interview available.
news.summary: In New York, Parade, the prominent legacy entertainment and lifestyle brand, has unveiled its newest cover story presenting an intimate interview with actor and producer Sterling K. Brown. The Emmy Award recipient discusses various topics including Paradise, the political thriller on Hulu that he produces and stars in, as well as addressing race in the entertainment sector. Brown also delves into the significant impact of fatherhood on his life, expressing that it is something he had long awaited. Furthermore, he touches on his strong bond with his wife and their two sons. For further insights, the full interview can be accessed for more details.

news.headline: DDC Enterprise, Ltd. (NYSE: DDC) regains NYSE listing compliance after resolving deficiency with Section 1003(a)(i).
news.summary: In New York, DDC Enterprise, Ltd. (NYSEAM: DDC) or "DayDayCook," a top Asian consumer food company, has confirmed compliance with the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) standards outlined in Part 10 of the NYSE American Company Guide. The Company addressed the listing deficiency related to Section 1003(a)(i) cited in an NYSE notice dated April 23, 2024. The resolution means DDC meets continued listing requirements.

news.headline: Sienna Senior Living Inc. declares a February dividend of $0.078 per share, $0.936 annually.
news.summary: Sienna Senior Living Inc., headquartered in Markham, Ontario, declared a dividend of $0.078 per common share (TSX: SIA) for February 2025. This equates to $0.936 per common share annually.

news.headline: Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd's ENT TERRACE ASAKUSA and ENT TERRACE AKIHABARA hotels in Japan won Booking.com's Traveler Review Awards 2025.
news.summary: Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: LRE), a premier Japanese real estate developer specializing in luxury residential properties such as single-family homes, condominiums, and hotels, has revealed that its ENT TERRACE series in Tokyo, along with other properties in Kanagawa Prefecture and Sapporo City, Japan, have achieved notable recognition. The company announced that its ENT TERRACE ASAKUSA and ENT TERRACE AKIHABARA extended-stay hotels were honored with Booking.com’s esteemed 13th Annual Traveler Review Awards for 2025. This acknowledgment underscores the exceptional quality and appeal of Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd's portfolio in the hospitality sector.

news.headline: flyExclusive is acquiring Jet.AI in all-stock deal, boosting growth capital and equity ownership.
news.summary: The proposed transaction aims to provide flyExclusive with extra capital for growth and increase trading liquidity by gaining additional equity ownership.

news.headline: Singapore-based BrilliA Inc partners with Maison Lejaby, French luxury brand, foreseeing up to €10 million supply deal.
news.summary: Singapore, Feb. 14, 2025 - BrilliA Inc, a leading cross-border service provider for women's intimate apparel brands, has successfully formed a partnership with renowned French luxury lingerie brand Maison Lejaby. The agreement entails a cooperation framework with an estimated supply worth of €10 million to cater to Maison Lejaby's anticipated demands. Through its subsidiary Bra Pro Limited, BrilliA Inc will supply a range of intimate apparel items such as bras, panties, bodysuits, sleepwear, and swimwear, tailored to meet the specific evolving needs of Maison Lejaby.

news.headline: Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) shares January 2025 operating data.
news.summary: Today, Robinhood Markets, Inc. disclosed key operating metrics for January 2025. The company, listed as HOOD on the NASDAQ, released this information.

news.headline: SRM Entertainment signs lock-up deal with Safety Shot, Inc. for 2,347,142 shares (13.7% of outstanding shares). No sale till Jan 1, 2026.
news.summary: Winter Park, Florida, news from February 14, 2025, reveals SRM Entertainment, Inc. (Nasdaq: SRM) disclosed a lock-up deal with Safety Shot, Inc., a significant shareholder, covering 2,347,142 shares of the Company's common stock, equivalent to about 13.7% of SRM Entertainment's total shares. This agreement, in effect from February 10, 2025, prohibits the shareholder from trading these shares until January 1, 2026, indicating a firm dedication to the Company's enduring strategy and steadiness.

news.headline: Star Equity Holdings, Inc. declares $0.25 cash dividend per share of 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. Record date: March 1, 2025; Payment date: March 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, on February 14, 2025, Star Equity Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: STRR; STRRP), a diversified holding company, declared a cash dividend of $0.25 per share for holders of its 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. The record date for the dividend is March 1, 2025, with the payment date set for March 10, 2025.

news.headline: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (ZONE) reports Q2 FY 2025 financial results and business update, developer of patented cleaning tech.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska on February 14, 2025, CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE American: ZONE), a company specializing in innovative technology offering a safe and cost-effective alternative to conventional cleaning products, announced its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 along with a general business overview.

Telecom's leading vendors in 3Q 2024 analyzed for revenue performance and market shifts. Report aids industry decision-makers.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Telecom's biggest vendors - 3Q24 Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com lineup. Aimed at providing telecom industry decision-makers with insights into spending patterns and vendor dominance, the report evaluates the revenues of technology vendors operating in the telecom sector. This market, also known as "telco network infrastructure" or "Telco N", examines a variety of company categories and technology segments. This report offers a comprehensive overview of revenue trends and market influence in the telecom sector.

news.headline: Anivive finishes LAVERDIA®-CA1 study on canine lymphoma in 9 states, preparing data for FDA review.
news.summary: Clinical trial locations in nine states have ceased operations for a major study on canine lymphoma. The efficacy data is currently being completed for statistical analysis and subsequent submission to the FDA. The announcement was made by Anivive, a Long Beach-based pet health company that utilizes software-driven solutions.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia loyalty programs market to grow 15.4% annually, reaching $842.5 million in 2025, intensifying competition in digital wallets & payment-linked loyalty programs.
news.summary: A report on Saudi Arabia's loyalty programs market predicts a 15.4% annual growth rate, with the market expected to reach US$842.5 million by 2025. The report, containing over 50 key performance indicators on loyalty program trends, covers various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. The loyalty market in Saudi Arabia has shown a consistent compound annual growth rate (CAGR) in value terms.

news.headline: EU's von Der Leyen Both the EU and US want to end the bloodshed in Ukraine and agree Ukraine needs solid security guarantees.
EC Pres. von der Leyen: We need a surge in European defense spending.
